title: IDEALHOUSE Scented Candles Gift Set, Soy Wax Candles of Vanilla Honey, Fresh Rose, and Lavender, Perfect Candles Gifts Set for Women, Birthdays, Weddings, Christmas, Yoga, Bath
features: 3 FRAGRANCES SCENTS: The romantic Rose scent gives a feeling of walking in the garden. A gentle Lavender scent like a forest after the rain, offering peace and relaxation. The Vanilla Honey scent followed by a sense of sweetness and happiness.

100% NATURAL SOY WAX: The scented candles are made of 100% soy wax with essential oil. It won't generate smoke, harmless, and no pollution. Essential oils do not contain acrid ingredients, which is safe for the elderly and children.

HIGH-QUALITY REUSEABLE JAR: Elegant brown amber glass container makes the glow of candlelight more warm and beautiful. The label can be removed and the jar can also be used for balms, lotions, spices after the candle is burned.

IDEAL GIFT: Stylish retro packaging, special glass jar. From the packaging to the container, they are all carefully and specially designed. When your family, friends, or lovers receive this scented candle gift set, they can feel your intentions and sincerity.

100% SATISFACTION: IDEALHOUSE provides full refunds and returns if there are any problems after receiving the product. Just let us know and we will solve the issue and answer your concern at the soonest.
description: Product Description Bathing, sleeping, reading, staying with friends and family, these wonderful times would be perfect if there are scented candles to create a relaxing and pleasant atmosphere. This IDEALHOUSE scented candle gift set is great for personal use and gift-giving. The classic scent, high-quality amber glass jar, exquisite packaging filled with blessings, these unique and intentional designs make it an ideal choice for a birthday, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas gifts. SPECIFICATIONS: Scent: Fresh Rose, Lavender, Vanilla Honey Material: 100% Soy Wax, Essential Oil, Glass Item Weight: 7.7oz (218g) Wax Net Weight: 3.5oz (99g) Burning Time: 26 hours Item Dimensions: 60x60x6.4mm Package Dimensions: 234x87x84mm Safe and Healthy Soy Wax The wax is made of soy, won't generate acrid smoke. The essential oils extracted from natural plants. It’s safe to use for children, the elderly, women. High-Quality Glass Jar The elegant brown glass container makes the glow of candlelight more warm and beautiful. The jar can be reused for balms, lotions, spices, etc. Best Gift Set A scented candle gift set that full of wishes and beauty is the best choice for Birthdays, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Christmas, Anniversary. Fresh Rose: Romantic It seems like your lover walks towards you with a bouquet of fresh fragrant roses. It is suitable for a beautiful you and a romantic night. Lavender: Relax Like a forest after the rain, soothing the fatigue of the day. Lavender fragrance can help you fall asleep and provides better sleep. Vanilla Honey: Happiness Sweet and warm, like eating vanilla-flavored toffee, followed by a sweet sense of satisfaction and happiness.
